title: GPT-4.1
summary: Model overview for GPT-4.1 covering long context, coding strength, and instruction-following behavior.
raw:
GPT-4.1

GPT-4.1 is a capable general-purpose model family with strong instruction following, coding performance, and long-context behavior.

Use it when you need reliable reasoning over large prompts, precise tool use, or stronger code generation than lighter models provide.

Choosing the model

Select GPT-4.1 when task quality matters more than the smallest possible latency or cost footprint.

model="gpt-4.1"

Evaluate capability, latency, and price tradeoffs against smaller or faster models for your workload.
